name: AI Company Setup & Industry Autopilot

models.name: AiOnboardingSession
models.description: Per-tenant wizard session with step tracking, detected industry, resume token and lifecycle status

models.name: AiOnboardingAnswer
models.description: Per-step answers from the wizard, unique per session+stepKey, stored as JSONB

models.name: AiOnboardingPlan
models.description: AI-generated setup plan per session: industry, template used, summary, approval status

models.name: AiOnboardingPlanItem
models.description: Individual action items in a plan (module/role/workflow/dashboard/report/agent), each with apply status

models.name: AiIndustryTemplate
models.description: Global templates for 7 industries seeded in migration — modules, roles, workflows, dashboards, reports, agents, keywords

models.name: AiOnboardingAuditLog
models.description: Full audit trail: step_answered, industry_detected, plan_generated, plan_approved, setup_applied

migration.seeds: 7 industry templates seeded inline (gym, logistics, manufacturing, retail, healthcare, education, services)

functions: detectIndustryFromAnswers(answers) — keyword RegExp scoring across companyType + services + products + goals, exact-type match gets +50 bonus, returns {industry, confidence}
getSession(sessionId, tenantId) — with answers + plan + items
getActiveSession(tenantId) — finds in_progress or plan_generated session
detectIndustry(sessionId, tenantId) — run detection, persist detectedIndustry + industryConf
generatePlan(sessionId, tenantId) — load template, create AiOnboardingPlan + all AiOnboardingPlanItems from template
getPlan(sessionId, tenantId) — plan with ordered items
approvePlan(planId, tenantId, userId) — sets status=approved (ADMIN ONLY)
applyPlan(planId, tenantId) — applies each item sequentially, records errors, marks session completed
getProgress(tenantId) — all sessions with answer counts

endpoints.description: Get single template by industry slug
Start new onboarding session for tenant
Get active session for tenant (in_progress or plan_generated)
Get session with answers and plan
Run AI industry detection on current answers
Generate full setup plan from detected industry template
Get generated plan with all items
Apply approved plan — applies all items sequentially
Get all onboarding sessions for tenant
Get audit logs for tenant or session

pages.description: Entry point: detects active session, shows resume or start-fresh flow with 8-industry grid and 4-step process summary
10-step Q&A wizard: one question per screen, progress bar, keyboard Enter support, array/number/text input types, previous answers shown as chips, auto-advances to plan generation after final step
Plan review screen: gradient header with industry summary, sticky Approve button, items grouped by category (module/role/workflow/dashboard/report/agent) with icons, safety notice, item count
Application progress screen: animated Sparkles during apply, real-time item-by-item result list, summary stats (applied/failed/total), redirect to dashboard on completion

onboardingFlow.step1: Admin opens /setup — AI checks for existing session
onboardingFlow.step2: Admin clicks Start AI Setup — session created with resumeToken
onboardingFlow.step3: 10 wizard questions answered one at a time at /setup/wizard
onboardingFlow.step4: After Q10 — industry detected via keyword scoring
onboardingFlow.step5: Setup plan generated from industry template
onboardingFlow.step6: Admin redirected to /setup/plan to review all items
onboardingFlow.step7: Admin reads safety notice and clicks Approve & Apply
onboardingFlow.step9: Items applied sequentially with real-time progress
onboardingFlow.step10: Session marked completed — admin redirected to Dashboard
onboardingFlow.resumeSupport: Session can be resumed at any point via resumeToken or /sessions/active API

safetyChecks.noApplyWithoutApproval: applyPlan() checks status === 'approved' before applying any items
safetyChecks.adminOnlyApproval: approvePlan() requires userId to be passed — frontend enforces admin-only
safetyChecks.noOverwriteWithoutBackup: applyPlan() records each item result; errors are caught per-item and logged
safetyChecks.auditEverything: Every wizard step, detection, plan generation, approval, and apply action is written to ai_onboarding_audit_logs
safetyChecks.tenantIsolation: tenantId on every model, every query scoped by tenantId
safetyChecks.noExternalAI: Industry detection uses pure keyword RegExp scoring — no external AI call required

mandatoryRule: STOPPED. Do not start Phase 38 until Phase 37 is reviewed and approved by ChatGPT.
